summary: P0 Features Testing Complete - All 3 tasks verified: (1) Email sender fallback to support@quadley.com, (2) Invitation for thefinks@icloud.com exists for ORMD0001 as RA, (3) Email change 2-step verification flow fully working in both backend and frontend.

email_sender_fallback.details: SENDER_EMAIL correctly falls back to support@quadley.com (not noreply@quadley.app)

invitation_thefinks.details: Invitation found in quadley_master.invitations for thefinks@icloud.com with role='ra', tenant_code='ORMD0001', status='pending', invite_code='ORMD-8JVK'

tests: Returns 200 with email_sent_to on success
Returns 400 for wrong password with 'Current password is incorrect'
Returns 400 for same email as current
Returns 400 for email already in use
Returns 400 for missing required fields
Returns 400 for invalid email format
Returns 401 without authentication
Returns 400 for wrong/invalid code
Returns 400 when no pending request exists
Returns 400 for missing code
Returns 200 and updates email with correct code
Returns 401 without authentication

full_email_change_flow.details: Complete flow tested: request -> retrieve code from DB -> verify -> email changed -> reverted back to original

tests: Profile module found at /dashboard/profile
Change Email Address section with data-testid='change-email-card'
Change Email button with data-testid='change-email-btn'
Step 1 form: new-email-input, email-change-password-input, submit-email-change-btn
Step 1 submit button shows 'Send Verification Code'
Wrong password shows error 'Current password is incorrect'
Correct password advances to Step 2
Step 2 shows verification code input with data-testid='email-verification-code-input'
Step 2 submit button shows 'Verify & Change Email'
Toast shows 'Verification code sent to your new email!'
Wrong code shows error 'Invalid verification code'
Cancel button works to reset flow

critical_code_review_comments: Email change 2-step verification is well implemented with proper password validation and code expiry
Frontend uses proper data-testid attributes for all interactive elements
SENDER_EMAIL fallback chain correctly prioritizes SENDGRID_FROM_EMAIL > SENDER_EMAIL > support@quadley.com
Verification codes stored in email_change_requests collection with 15-minute expiry
context_for_next_testing_agent: P0 email change feature fully tested. Key routes: /dashboard/profile (frontend), /api/auth/request-email-change and /api/auth/verify-email-change (backend). Invitation for thefinks@icloud.com is pending at ORMD0001 with invite code ORMD-8JVK.

mocked_apis.note: All APIs are real. Email sending is configured with SendGrid but may be disabled in test environment.
